title: Green Balloons, Pack of 100, 10 Inch Latex Balloons for Birthday, Wedding, Baby Shower, Anniversary, Graduation
features: Green balloons: you will receive 100 green balloons with 10 inch latex balloons. This complete set offers everything you need to make your party an unforgettable experience with an elegant and warm colour atmosphere.

High-quality material and durable: our green balloons are made of high-quality, environmentally friendly natural latex. The material is particularly strong, stretchy and tear-resistant, so the balloons remain intact throughout your event and do not burst easily.

Easy to inflate and versatile: the balloons can be easily filled with air or helium (a pump is recommended). Tip: Fill 85-90% to achieve optimal shape and durability. They are perfect for imaginative decorations on occasions such as birthdays, weddings and celebrations.

Important safety instructions: Choking hazard. Uninflated or burst balloons can be accidentally inhaled by children under the age of 8 and cause fatal choking hazard.Keep away from children under 8 years.Always inflate and use under adult supervision.Dispose of burst balloons immediately.Latex allergy warning: This product contains natural rubber latex, which can cause allergic reactions in sensitized people.

Ideal decoration and satisfaction: these versatile green balloons are the ideal decoration for parties of all kinds and give any occasion a festive touch. If you still have any questions, our customer service is happy to help.
